name: C-5 verifier-output JSON includes an emitted_at ISO timestamp per the architecture audit-trail contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --emit v.json --verdict concur --pr-sha abc123 && grep -qE '"emitted_at":"[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}T' v.json && echo timestamped 1>&2
